name: Barack Obama
subject: Hamilton?
body:
The joke's on us | Friend --

Way back in 2009, we invited a young, talented writer named Lin-Manuel Miranda to perform at the very first White House Poetry Jam. He got up on stage and said he would perform a piece about “someone who embodies hip-hop, Treasury Secretary Alexander Hamilton.” We laughed.

Looks like the joke’s on us.

In seven short years, _Hamilton_ has gone from a spark in Lin-Manuel’s brilliant mind to a landscape-changing, genre-reinventing, revolutionary piece of musical theater. I have to admit I’ve seen it twice -- we’ve invited the cast to perform at the White House and even introduced the show at the Tonys. You could say that Michelle and I are superfans.

**[So -- what are you up to in July? Want to see the show and show your commitment to electing my friend Hillary and other Democrats at the same time?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU4MzQ1MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTE4NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Hillary's team is saving seats for one lucky supporter (and your guest!) at a production of _Hamilton_ this summer. And you won’t need to worry about flights or hotels -- just get ready to clap after "Cabinet Battle #1".

**So what do you say? Enter for a chance to see _Hamilton_ with Hillary this summer:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU4MzQ1MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTE4NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Barack

|
**Chip in $1 to stand with Hillary and Democrats down the ticket -- and be automatically entered to meet her at a performance of _Hamilton_ :**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU4MzQ1MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTE4NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

******No purchase, payment, contribution, or signing up to receive texts is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.**

Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 6/17/16 at 12:00 a.m. (all times Eastern) and 6/30/16 at 11:59 p.m. Enter by visiting [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjU4MzQ1MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTE4NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to donate, or enter by texting HAMILTON to 47246 to sign up to receive periodic text messages from Hillary for America. Msg&data; rates apply. Text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU4MzQ1MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTE4NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter for free without contributing or signing up to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive a special invitation for winner and one (1) guest to attend the Hamilton in New York City as well as round-trip airline tickets for winner and winner’s guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the New York City area and one (1) night hotel accommodation for winner and winner’s guest (approximate retail value of Prizes: $3500). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU4MzQ1MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTE4NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary Victory Fund, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185-5256.

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU4MzQ1MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTE4NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)** Paid for by Hillary Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Hillary for America, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AR, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, IA, KS, KY, LA, ME, MA, MI, MN, MS, MO, MT, NV, NH, NJ, NM, NC, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, WV, WI, and WY.

**Contributions or gifts to Hillary Victory Fund are not tax deductible.** This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU4MzQ1MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTE4NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU4MzQ1MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTE4NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU4MzQ1MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTE4NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU4MzQ1MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTE4NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU4MzQ1MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTE4NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU4MzQ1MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTE4NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU4MzQ1MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTE4NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU4MzQ1MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTE4NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU4MzQ1MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTE4NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary Victory Fund, P.O. Box 1366, Merrifield, VA 22116-9559 [Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU4MzQ1MTIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzOTE4NzY3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Steve Bullock
subject: quick debate debrief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

I just walked off the stage of the first gubernatorial debate. For me, this election is about the Montana we're going to leave to our kids and grandchildren.

Good public schools, access to public lands and waters, fiscal responsibility and an economy that provides opportunity for everyone -- that's what I've fought for as your governor and will continue to do so to keep our state great. That was my message this morning.

But not everyone is going to watch debates like this, and my opponent is spending hundreds of thousands of dollars on TV ads -- in fact, he released two new ads just this week. So I need your help to spread our message. **[Click here to donate $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=mf7SoEtIiW27pYKCe23pf6Fj6jYcVZQk)**

Thanks,

Steve Bullock

P.S. If you missed it, you can watch the replay at 4pm this afternoon on NBC in Billings or ABC/FOX throughout the state.
---
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=5y2D2O9ERMrwEXV7BRepjKFj6jYcVZQk)
---
| Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=PT%2FVBttf64o%2BSt8lA%2FsTwaFj6jYcVZQk).

Friends of Steve Bullock
Post Office Box 1330
Helena MT 59624 United States
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: hey, you need to hear this (Rubio)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c1b/738133e4/367cddcc/7f828165/2572936776/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160626?refcode=pme160626_m&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
| Our race just went from close to **closest.** Marco Rubio and I are within single-digits in the latest polls. And the outcome could determine control of the Senate. I don't want to give Mitch McConnell another two years in charge to push his destructive policies -- and I know you don't, either.

**So how do we stop Marco in his tracks? We fight back harder than ever. And we make sure we have the resources we need to do it.**

Our finance team tells me that we have $50,000 left to go to meet our goal by Thursday's critical end of quarter FEC deadline. And that means we need to bring in $10,000 online today to stay on pace.

Can you help out, Friend? [**Please chip in $5 or $10 now to beat Marco Rubio and take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c1b/738133e4/367cddcc/7f828165/2572936776/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160626?refcode=pme160626_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Thank you for your support,

Patrick |
Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c1b/738133e4/367cddcc/7f828166/2572936776/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com") This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2c1b/738133e4/367cddcc/7f828167/2572936776/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

name: Mark Pocan
subject: A courageous ally
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
Russ does what's right. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4357/1c469400/6d450b8/356b60b/1106262606/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&utm_campaign=eoq4&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Some elected leaders supported the LGBT community only once the tide of public opinion changed in support of marriage equality. **Russ Feingold has been with us all along.** For me, it's personal. My husband, Phil, and I were married in Canada in 2006, but had to wait years before our marriage was legally recognized in the United States. When Russ announced his public support for marriage equality in 2006, we were thrilled! Because, even though this might seem like recent history, many elected officials didn't stand with us. Russ is no stranger to doing what's right in the face of opposition. **That's because he listens to Wisconsinites.** It's as simple as it is rare. I support Russ because he's a courageous ally. Because he's not afraid to do what's right -- even if it isn't popular. Now I'm asking you to step up for Russ. His campaign is nearing a critical end-of-quarter filing deadline on June 30 and has an ambitious $250,000 goal to meet. **[Will you contribute $5 to Russ Feingold's campaign today, to help him reach a $250,000 goal by June 30?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4357/1c469400/6d450b8/356b60b/1106262606/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&utm_campaign=eoq4&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4357/1c469400/6d450b8/356b60b/1106262606/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&utm_campaign=eoq4&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4357/1c469400/6d450b8/356b60b/1106262606/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&utm_campaign=eoq4&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4357/1c469400/6d450b8/356b608/1106262606/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&utm_campaign=eoq4&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
| | [$25 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4357/1c469400/6d450b8/356b609/1106262606/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&utm_campaign=eoq4&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---
| [$100 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4357/1c469400/6d450b8/356b606/1106262606/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&utm_campaign=eoq4&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4357/1c469400/6d450b8/356b607/1106262606/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&utm_campaign=eoq4&utm_medium=ema&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")
---
Today, on the first anniversary of marriage equality, my heart is with Orlando, where just a short time ago, 49 people at a LGBT club were senselessly murdered. These people were targets of an act of hate and terror during Pride Month, at a gay bar -- a safe space where LGBT are free to celebrate one another. This attack has reignited so much fear and uncertainty in our community.
**Today, I'm thinking about how far we've come, and how far we have yet to go.**
Now, more than ever, we need to elect leaders who will bring Americans together -- regardless of who you are or whom you love -- not divide us further. We need leaders who listen and who act on the courage of their convictions. We need leaders who will take a stand against hate, in all its forms. We need leaders like Russ.
**[I hope you'll join me and my husband, Phil, in supporting Russ's campaign for Senate.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4357/1c469400/6d450b8/356b60b/1106262606/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&utm_campaign=eoq4&utm_medium=ema")**
Thanks,
Representative Mark Pocan
2nd Congressional District, Wisconsin
[CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4357/1c469400/6d450b8/356b60b/1106262606/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-eoq?utm_source=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&refcode=ema_2016-06-26_eoq4_pocan_nd&utm_campaign=eoq4&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to make a contribution to Russ for Wisconsin, [click here.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4357/1c469400/6d450b8/356b604/1106262606/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-def?utm_source=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&refcode=ema_2016-01-14_fr-footer-contribute&utm_campaign=advocacy-footer-contribute&utm_medium=ema") If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4357/1c469400/6d450b8/356b605/1106262606/VEsHBw/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/fr-optput"). If you would like to change your email or salutation, [click here](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4357/1c469400/6d450b8/356b602/1106262606/VEsHBg/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/page/s/changeinfo"). [Click here to unsubscribe](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4357/1c469400/6d450b8/356b603/1106262606/VEsHAQ/ "http://action.russfeingold.com/unsubscribe"). Contributions or gifts to Russ for Wisconsin are not tax deductible. | Authorized and paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
---

name: Team Maggie
subject: With Senate control on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd460/2a380d31/1339c044/fbf85c/2614942970/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd460/2a380d31/1339c044/fbf85c/2614942970/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd460/2a380d31/1339c044/fbf85d/2614942970/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNjI2LW5oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160626-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Here's the update -- on June 30 we face our biggest FEC fundraising deadline yet. We have to hit our goal: $50,000 in online donations. **If we fall short now, we could lose in New Hampshire -- our best, and maybe only, chance at taking back the Senate.**
With Senate control on the line, **NPR says New Hampshire is "one of the marquee races this cycle."** And right now the polls show Maggie's in a dead heat, and a Mitch McConnell-linked group just dumped $4.6 MILLION into attack ads to make sure she doesn't win!
Unless grassroots donors like you give now to hit our $50,000 goal by the FEC deadline, Republicans could hold Senate control and the future of the Supreme Court in their hands.
Maggie needs you to give now -- every dollar you can:
**[Please donate $3 or more before the June 30 FEC deadline to elect Maggie in New Hampshire, take back the Senate, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd460/2a380d31/1339c044/fbf85d/2614942970/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNjI2LW5oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160626-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd460/2a380d31/1339c044/fbf85e/2614942970/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNjI2LW5oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UVNCOWZRPT0iOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160626-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd460/2a380d31/1339c044/fbf85f/2614942970/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNjI2LW5oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UWlCOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160626-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd460/2a380d31/1339c044/fbf858/2614942970/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNjI2LW5oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UXlCOWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160626-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd460/2a380d31/1339c044/fbf85d/2614942970/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNjI2LW5oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160626-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for stepping up.
Team Maggie
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd460/2a380d31/1339c044/fbf85d/2614942970/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNjI2LW5oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160626-nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Bob Fertik, Democrats.com
subject: Support President Obama: Expand Social Security
body:
| | | [](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128201MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-26)
---|---|---
Dear Activist,

[](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128202MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-26)President Obama is taking a stand to strengthen social security for the next generation.

For too long, Congress has failed to act while hard-working Americans see their pensions dwindle and savings decrease. [**Join the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee and urge Congress to guarantee our seniors the retirement they have earned.**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128203MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-26)

We know what we're up against – [**Paul Ryan and Congressional Republicans have proposed disastrous cuts to Social Security**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128204MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-26). Now, they want a Republican President to make their nightmare a reality.

54 million Americans rely on these benefits. For many of them, it is just enough to make ends meet. A secure retirement is the promise of America, and that means more than just getting by.

No senior should have to worry if they can pay their next bill because they don't work anymore. [**Take a stand and support President Obama's proposal to make Social Security work for everyone, not just a privileged few.**](http://mail.democrats.com/CT00128205MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2016-06-26)

Paid for by DSCC
* * *
Democrats.com is the oldest online community of progressive activists, with over 3 million
supporters. We fight for jobs, justice, healthcare, education, the environment, and peace.
We're supported by great progressive partners so we never ask for donations.
Please join us at **[Democrats.com](http://democrats.com)**! You are subscriber #10036727 to Democrats.com Activist Alerts.
[Click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=L43) if you do not want future messages from DSCC.
If you do not want messages from any of our partners [click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=noads).
[Click here](http://archive.democrats.com/unsub.cfm?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&fieldname=L1) to permanently unsubscribe from all Democrats.com lists.

name: Official McGinty Campaign
subject: Can you help?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Hey, did you see this note? [**Can you help?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1382332282165002240/-9212088848530538496?refcode=e20160626.2&refcode2=e20160626.2nd&amount=25)

It's no exaggeration -- we _**_need_**_ to raise the $29,890 left to hit our goal before the FEC deadline, or we could fall off pace and lose the momentum we've built since we entered the general election.

**[Chip in $5, or whatever you can, right now to help Katie win this race for working families in PA and across the country.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1382332282165002240/-9212088848530538496?refcode=e20160626.2&refcode2=e20160626.2nd&amount=25)**

_The Hill_ , _Roll Call_ , and _NPR_ all report that Toomey's Senate seat is among the most likely to flip -- and if we keep fighting, and hitting our fundraising goals, we can turn Pennsylvania blue again. **But if we fall short** , that could mean Mitch McConnell still in control of the Senate, more GOP obstruction, and 6 more years of Pat Toomey.

**You can help us meet our FEC fundraising goal, but there isn 't much time. Quick, send your support before the end-of-quarter deadline:**

**[www.katiemcginty.com/QuarterDeadline](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1382332282165002240/-9212088848530538496?refcode=e20160626.2&refcode2=e20160626.2nd&amount=25)**

Thank you,

Team Katie

_\--- Original Message ---
From: Katie McGinty
Subject: one week
Date: June 23, 2016 10:22 AM_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1382332282165002240/-9212088848530538496?refcode=e20160626.2&refcode2=e20160626.2nd&amount=25)

Friend,

We've come a long way together. When I entered this race for Pennsylvania's Senate seat nearly a year ago, we were the underdog. From the ground up, we built a campaign that won a hard fought primary. Then, we turned right around and closed the gap on Pat Toomey with polls showing that we can win this race. When I look back on this journey, I'm blown away.

[**Friend, we can 't stop now -- not with so much on the line.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1382332282165002240/-9212088848530538496?refcode=e20160626.2&refcode2=e20160626.2nd&amount=25) Not with Toomey's $9 million war chest at his disposal. Not with Toomey's repeated votes against middle class priorities, against keeping Pennsylvanians safe, and for the interests of Wall Street and the Koch brothers.

We can't let his actions stand. But if we want to really make change together, then I'm going to need you right now.

**Today marks one week until the FEC end-of-quarter deadline, our biggest deadline of the general election yet.** On July 1, everyone is going to be looking at our fundraising numbers to see if we have the grassroots support to go up against Toomey, his war chest, and his Super PAC supporters.

[**Will you pitch in $5 to help us reach our ambitious $50,000 end-of-quarter goal so our campaign can finish what we started?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1382332282165002240/-9212088848530538496?refcode=e20160626.2&refcode2=e20160626.2nd&amount=25)

I've seen what we've done so far. So I know we have the right stuff to win this race. But I need your help to show it.

[**Will you pitch in to help us reach our $50,000 goal before the FEC deadline? Let 's show that this campaign has what it takes to defeat Toomey and stand up for Pennsylvanians.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1382332282165002240/-9212088848530538496?refcode=e20160626.2&refcode2=e20160626.2nd&amount=25)

Thank you for everything you do,

Katie

| *** End-of-Quarter Deadline Approaching ***

In six days, we face the biggest FEC deadline of our campaign so far, and we urgently need your grassroots support to reach our goal. Will you chip in before the deadline?

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1382332282165002240/-9212088848530538496?refcode=e20160626.2&refcode2=e20160626.2nd&amount=25 "https://act.myngp.com/el/-1382332282165002240/-9212088848530538496?refcode=e20160612&refcode2=e20160612nd&amount=25")**
---
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1382332282165002240/9162597631141085184).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Phil Johnson, Team Gregg
subject: Announcing: Gregg/Hale Campaign Fellowships
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
Announcing: Gregg/Hale Campaign Fellowships.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5523136734092986368/-4656863251319617536)
---
Peter, Ready to take your involvement in the Gregg/Hale campaign to the next level? Join our exciting group of Campaign Fellows who are working hard to move Indiana forward. We know that the power of this campaign lies in the people behind our movement and our campaign fellows are a key part of building the momentum in communities across the state. Wondering if you're the right fit? A great campaign fellow is: √ Highly adaptable √ Able to communicate strongly √ Exceptionally organized √ Enthusiastic about the future of Indiana √ Ready to work hard This is the perfect opportunity for college and high school students who are ready to go the extra mile to elect John and Christina in November. Full or part-time fellows are available for class credit. Fellows will have the opportunity to join a highly competitive gubernatorial race and gain firsthand political and organizing experience while working alongside key campaign staff. Duties will include making direct voter contact door-to- door and phone-banking; recruiting, training and overseeing volunteers; staffing events; and more -- there's never a dull moment on a campaign! Positions are available around the state. If you're interested, please send your current resume to pjohnson@greggforgovernor.com See you on the campaign trail, Phil Johnson Political Director, Gregg for Governor

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/5523136734092986368/-4584805657281689600) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5523136734092986368/-4512748063243761664)
Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
---
Gregg for Indiana
PO Box 44224
Indianapolis IN 46244 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/5523136734092986368/-4728920845357545472).

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Hamilton tickets for you!
body:
You shouldn't miss this chance | Friend --

I'm saving a seat for two supporters like you at _Hamilton_ \-- but it looks like you haven't entered for a chance to be there with me. **[What are you waiting for?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU4MzcyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDA1Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Don’t miss this chance! I've really been looking forward to this, and I want you to be there.

**I hope you can join me next month:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU4MzcyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDA1Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Hillary

|
**Chip in $1 to stand with Hillary and Democrats down the ticket -- and be automatically entered to meet her at a performance of _Hamilton_ :**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU4MzcyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDA1Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

******No purchase, payment, contribution, or signing up to receive texts is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.**

Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 6/17/16 at 12:00 a.m. (all times Eastern) and 6/30/16 at 11:59 p.m. Enter by visiting [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjU4MzcyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDA1Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to donate, or enter by texting HAMILTON to 47246 to sign up to receive periodic text messages from Hillary for America. Msg&data; rates apply. Text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU4MzcyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDA1Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter for free without contributing or signing up to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive a special invitation for winner and one (1) guest to attend the Hamilton in New York City as well as round-trip airline tickets for winner and winner’s guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the New York City area and one (1) night hotel accommodation for winner and winner’s guest (approximate retail value of Prizes: $3500). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjU4MzcyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDA1Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary Victory Fund, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185-5256.

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU4MzcyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDA1Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)** Paid for by Hillary Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Hillary for America, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AR, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, IA, KS, KY, LA, ME, MA, MI, MN, MS, MO, MT, NV, NH, NJ, NM, NC, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, WV, WI, and WY.

**Contributions or gifts to Hillary Victory Fund are not tax deductible.** This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU4MzcyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDA1Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU4MzcyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDA1Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjU4MzcyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDA1Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU4MzcyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDA1Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU4MzcyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDA1Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU4MzcyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDA1Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU4MzcyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDA1Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU4MzcyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDA1Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU4MzcyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDA1Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary Victory Fund, P.O. Box 1366, Merrifield, VA 22116-9559 [Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU4MzcyMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODI0MDA1Mzk1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Don’t miss this chance! I've really been looking forward to this, and I want you to be there. I hope you can join me next month: Thank you, Hillary | Chip in $1 to stand with Hillary and Democrats down the ticket -- and be automatically entered to meet her at a performance of Hamilton : | ****No purchase, payment, contribution, or signing up to receive texts is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 6/17/16 at 12:00 a.m. (all times Eastern) and 6/30/16 at 11:59 p.m. Enter by visiting to donate, or enter by texting HAMILTON to 47246 to sign up to receive periodic text messages from Hillary for America. Msg&data; rates apply. Text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit to enter for free without contributing or signing up to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive a special invitation for winner and one (1) guest to attend the Hamilton in New York City as well as round-trip airline tickets for winner and winner’s guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the New York City area and one (1) night hotel accommodation for winner and winner’s guest (approximate retail value of Prizes: $3500). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary Victory Fund, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185-5256. Did someone forward this email to you? name: Paul Manafort, DonaldJTrump.com
subject: Republicans have been waiting for this
body:
We've had a great week, and want to thank you. Tap or click here.
| | |
---|---|---
| [](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11eYTlycGVw3xMzukFo3uQGkx) |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| Peter,

This was a HUGE week for Team Trump.

On Tuesday, Mr. Trump sent out the very first fundraising email of this campaign. _It was a record-shattering success_. If you were able to help, thank you.

And if you just haven't had a chance to yet, **[please take a moment to chip in today](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11eYXkTy7ERyvLjGceMpdPiq8)**.

[**CHIP IN $5**](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11eZ1keTyod3tK3S3OaKWNUvJ)
Our goal was to raise $2 million in 48 hours, which Mr. Trump committed to match $1 for $1. **It took _just 12 hours_ to hit this mark - __stunning__ the Clinton campaign and the liberal media!** |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| [](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11eZ5jAeZ7yyrIO3Vnz6FMwBk) |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| On Wednesday, Mr. Trump hit it out of the park when he delivered a scathing indictment of world-class liar Hillary Clinton's disastrous record and dangerous agenda.

It has been hailed as the speech conservative Republicans have been waiting __decades__ to hear from their presidential nominee.

**[Peter, will you stand with Team Trump at this critical stage of the campaign with a $10, $25, $50, or $100 contribution, or more if you can?](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11eZ9iVApQU3pHyfMWXsoL8GV)** |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| [](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11eZdigVQAfynGirEwlO7JKMw) |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| On Thursday we launched the "Lying Crooked Hillary" campaign - a new website and series of videos detailing Clinton's Legendary Lies. The first video has already received an amazing 2.5 million views, and nine more videos will be released in the weeks ahead.

**Peter, Team Trump is taking the fight to Lying Crooked Hillary like nobody has ever done before**.

And on Friday, Mr. Trump released a powerful statement commending UK voters for taking a stand for freedom and independence. _They voted to take their country back and determine their future_ , just like the American people can do on November 8, 2016.

[**To win on Election Day we must continue building our momentum. Please chip in today to help us make voters believe in America again**](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11eZhhChhjB3lF2Dw5K9QImS7).

Please stand with us to make Donald J. Trump the next President of the United States.

Thank you,

Paul Manafort
Campaign Chair and Chief Strategist, Trump for President
[**DONATE NOW**](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11eZlgXCI2WyjDMPnF8vzGYXI)

|
| |
| TEXT **TRUMP** TO **88022** TO GET EXCLUSIVE UPDATES
***By participating, you consent to receive recurring text messages sent by an automatic telephone dialing system. Consent to these terms is not a condition of purchase. Msg&data rates may apply. Click here for the T&C/Privacy Policy: [donaldjtrump.com/sms-terms/88022](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11eZtfEjzvDyfBhd6NVd1Ed8U)

| [**Click Here**](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11eZxeZF0eZ3dA1oYnjyKCPev) To Stand With Donald Trump and |
---|---|---
| MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! |
| If you would like to purchase official campaign gear, [click here.](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11eZBel0qYkybyLAPWHUtBrk6) |
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To update your profile, [click here](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11eZFdGlRHG39xvMHw6gcA3pH). If you would like to unsubscribe from our email list, [click here](http://mail.donaldjtrump.com/c/11eZJd1Hir1y7wfYz5uBVyFvi). |
